# Walid Elsayed — Web Developer & Designer

> Walid Elsayed is a full-stack web developer and designer based in New Orleans, Louisiana. He builds production-grade websites and web applications using Vue 3, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and Node.js. He works with local businesses and organizations to deliver fast, accessible, brand-aligned digital experiences.

## About

- **Name**: Walid Elsayed
- **Role**: Full-stack web developer and designer
- **Location**: New Orleans, Louisiana, USA
- **Email**: walidelsayed316@gmail.com
- **Specialties**: Vue 3, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, responsive design, performance optimization, AI-assisted development, design systems

## Services

- Custom website design and development for small businesses
- Vue.js and React single-page applications
- Restaurant and hospitality websites with online ordering integration
- Educational and nonprofit platforms
- Bilingual websites (English/Spanish, English/Arabic)
- Performance optimization and Core Web Vitals improvements
- Migration from legacy stacks (HTML/Bootstrap → modern frameworks)

## Featured Projects

### OK Ice Cream Shop
- **URL**: https://okicecreamshop.com/
- **Type**: Marketing website for a local ice cream shop in the French Quarter, New Orleans
- **Stack**: HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, responsive design
- **Source**: https://github.com/Ax3lJD/OKIcecreamshop

### Yami Hibachi & Poboy
- **URL**: https://yamihibachipoboys.com/home
- **Type**: Restaurant website with online ordering for a Japanese-Cajun fusion eatery in Metairie, LA
- **Stack**: HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript

### Daris
- **URL**: https://daris.education
- **Type**: Online education platform for Islamic studies and Quran instruction
- **Stack**: Vue.js, Bootstrap, JavaScript

### SAHA Institute for Learning
- **URL**: https://sahainstituteforlearning.com
- **Type**: Educational platform for tutoring services and structured learning programs
- **Stack**: Vue.js, Tailwind CSS, TypeScript, Vite

### Campos Muños Law
- **URL**: https://camulaw.com
- **Type**: Bilingual website (English/Spanish) for an immigration law firm based in New Orleans, serving clients across all 50 states
- **Stack**: HTML, CSS, Bootstrap, JavaScript

## Blog

Plain-spoken guides for small business owners on website ownership, builder fees, site speed, and hiring a local developer. Index at https://walidelsayed.com/blog.

- [Custom Website vs Wix: What a Small Business Actually Owns](https://walidelsayed.com/blog/custom-website-vs-wix-small-business) — ownership, fees, and speed of a custom site versus Wix.
- [Do You Actually Own Your Shopify Store?](https://walidelsayed.com/blog/do-you-own-your-shopify-store) — what you control on Shopify, what stays locked in, and transaction fees.
- [Wix vs Squarespace vs a Custom Website](https://walidelsayed.com/blog/wix-vs-squarespace-vs-custom-website) — the two builders and a hand-built site compared on ownership, fees, and speed.
- [What a Small Business Website Should Cost](https://walidelsayed.com/blog/what-a-small-business-website-should-cost) — subscription total cost of ownership versus a one-time custom build.
- [Website Speed and Local SEO: Why Core Web Vitals Matter](https://walidelsayed.com/blog/website-speed-local-seo-core-web-vitals) — how template bloat hurts Core Web Vitals and local rankings.
- [Website Builder Transaction Fees Compared](https://walidelsayed.com/blog/website-builder-transaction-fees-compared) — Shopify, Wix, and Squarespace selling fees, verified and dated.
- [Hiring a New Orleans Web Developer vs Using a Template](https://walidelsayed.com/blog/new-orleans-web-developer-vs-template) — local knowledge, ownership, and local SEO a template misses.
- [Bilingual Websites for Small Business](https://walidelsayed.com/blog/bilingual-websites-small-business) — reaching Spanish and Arabic speakers, and why translate plugins fall short.
- [Restaurant Online Ordering Without Commission Fees](https://walidelsayed.com/blog/restaurant-online-ordering-no-commission-fees) — how delivery-app commissions compare to ordering on your own site.
- [Owning Your Domain, Code, and Data: A Small Business Guide](https://walidelsayed.com/blog/own-your-domain-code-and-data) — the three assets to own and how platform lock-in happens.

## Contact

For project inquiries, freelance work, or full-time opportunities, contact Walid at walidelsayed316@gmail.com or via the contact form at https://walidelsayed.com/contact.
